title: salvia bicolor var. dichroa
intro: Salvia bicolor var. dichroa is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, known for its vibrant purple and white flowers that attract pollinators. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Salvia bicolor var. dichroa include its ability to calm the nervous system, improve respiratory function, and provide antioxidant properties that protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory infections.
